languages.text: "Wait. You do not have to do this. You can make a different choice."

traits.locale_text: "Wait. You do not have to do this. You can make a different choice."
"Wait. You do not have to do this. You can make a different choice."
"Wait. You do not have to do this. You can make a different choice."

languages.text: «Espere. No tiene por qué hacerlo. Puede escoger otra forma».
languages.original_text: "Wait. You do not have to do this. You can make a different choice."

traits.locale_text: «Espere. No tiene por qué hacerlo. Puede escoger otra forma».

languages.text: “等等，你没必要这么做。你还有别的选择。”
languages.original_text: "Wait. You do not have to do this. You can make a different choice."

traits.locale_text: “等等，你没必要这么做。你还有别的选择。”

languages.text: « Attendez. Rien ne vous oblige à faire ça. Vous pouvez prendre une autre décision. »
languages.original_text: "Wait. You do not have to do this. You can make a different choice."

traits.locale_text: « Attendez. Rien ne vous oblige à faire ça. Vous pouvez prendre une autre décision. »

languages.text: "Bekle. Bunu yapmak zorunda değilsin. Farklı bir seçim yapabilirsin."
languages.original_text: "Wait. You do not have to do this. You can make a different choice."

traits.locale_text: "Bekle. Bunu yapmak zorunda değilsin. Farklı bir seçim yapabilirsin."

languages.text: "Wartet. Ihr müsst das nicht tun. Ihr könnte eine andere Wahl treffen."
languages.original_text: "Wait. You do not have to do this. You can make a different choice."

traits.locale_text: "Wartet. Ihr müsst das nicht tun. Ihr könnte eine andere Wahl treffen."

languages.text: 「待て。こんなことをする必要はない。別の選択もできるはずだ」
languages.original_text: "Wait. You do not have to do this. You can make a different choice."

traits.locale_text: 「待て。こんなことをする必要はない。別の選択もできるはずだ」
